task_completion.description: Open the 'Ammonia Leak 2024' incident record for 'Northside Cold Storage' in CAMEO Data Manager
task_completion.visual_evidence: CAMEO Data Manager application is open and the specific incident record ('Ammonia Leak 2024' / 'Northside Cold Storage') is selected or displayed on the screen.

task_completion.description: Record the Wind Speed and Wind Direction
task_completion.visual_evidence: The weather/conditions section of the incident record shows '8' in the Wind Speed field and 'SE' or '135' in the Wind Direction field.
The weather/conditions section of the incident record shows '82' in the Temperature field and '65' in the Humidity field.

task_completion.description: Record the Sky Conditions as Partly Cloudy
task_completion.visual_evidence: The weather/conditions section of the incident record shows 'Partly Cloudy' selected or typed in the sky conditions field.

task_completion.description: Export the updated incident data to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\incident_update.csv
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save/export dialog or file explorer window showing the file 'incident_update.csv' being saved to or existing in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the CAMEO Data Manager graphical interface to update the record
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the CAMEO Data Manager application windows and forms, rather than a terminal, command prompt, or script modifying database files directly.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's built-in export functionality
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show CAMEO Data Manager's export menus or dialogs being used, rather than a text editor (like Notepad) being used to manually type out a CSV file.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine CAMEO Data Manager software
integrity.visual_evidence: The window titles, icons, and interface layout match CAMEO Data Manager, not a generic database viewer (like DB Browser for SQLite) or a web browser.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verify the following values are entered in the CAMEO Data Manager interface: Wind Speed = 8, Wind Direction = SE (or 135), Temperature = 82, Humidity = 65, Sky Conditions = Partly Cloudy. The final export must be saved exactly as C:\Users\Docker\Documents\incident_update.csv.
